'''hachaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sveite|sveite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ch-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sveite|sveite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hachaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæchæyæth|hæchæyæth]] || [[word:hæchæyæj|hæchæyæj]] || [[word:hæchæyæsh|hæchæyæsh]] || [[word:hæchæyæ|hæchæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hachachayath|hachachayath]] || [[word:hachachayaj|hachachayaj]] || [[word:hachachayash|hachachayash]] || [[word:hachachaya|hachachaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hachayath|hachayath]] || [[word:hachayaj|hachayaj]] || [[word:hachayash|hachayash]] || [[word:hachaya|hachaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hachafyath|hachafyath]] || [[word:hachafyaj|hachafyaj]] || [[word:hachafyash|hachafyash]] || [[word:hachafyaf|hachafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hachayatha|hachayatha]] || [[word:hachayaja|hachayaja]] || [[word:hachayasha|hachayasha]] || [[word:hachayaka|hachayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hachayath|hachayath]] || [[word:hachayaj|hachayaj]] || [[word:hachayash|hachayash]] || [[word:hachaya|hachaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hachayathal|hachayathal]] || [[word:hachayajal|hachayajal]] || [[word:hachayashal|hachayashal]] || [[word:hachayakal|hachayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hachayathatha|hachayathatha]] || [[word:hachayajaja|hachayajaja]] || [[word:hachayashasha|hachayashasha]] || [[word:hachayaka|hachayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hachayathan|hachayathan]] || [[word:hachayajan|hachayajan]] || [[word:hachayashan|hachayashan]] || [[word:hachayakan|hachayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hachayathaoro|hachayathaoro]] || [[word:hachayajaoro|hachayajaoro]] || [[word:hachayashaoro|hachayashaoro]] || [[word:hachayakaoro|hachayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
